title: Technician
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  • Operate, monitor, and maintain production, testing, or laboratory equipment by following Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).
  • Perform routine calibrations, verification, preventive maintenance, and basic troubleshooting or repair work to ensure smooth operation and minimize operational downtime.
  • Assist in setup, calibration, and verification of machines, tools, and measurement instruments.
  • Support senior or lead technicians during more complex maintenance, testing, calibration, or equipment-related tasks.
  • Maintain accurate records of equipment maintenance, inspections, calibration results, and repair; promptly report any abnormalities, defects, or safety concerns.
  • Comply with Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) regulations, company safety guidelines, and quality requirements at all times.
  • Participate in continuous improvement initiatives, to enhance maintenance practices, workflow efficiency, equipment handling, housekeeping, and workplace safety.
  • Perform other related technical or operational duties as assigned.

Job Requirements:

  • ITE, Polytechnic Diploma, or equivalent technical qualification in Mechanical, Electrical, Mechatronics, Industrial Maintenance, or a related technical discipline.
  • Fresh graduates are welcome. Candidates with relevant experience in manufacturing, maintenance, laboratory, or equipment operation environments will have an advantage.
  • Basic knowledge of hand tools, maintenance tools, machine operation, and standard workshop practices.
  • Good understanding of safety procedures and willingness to follow safety rules, SOPs, and work instructions.
  • Basic computer skills (e.g. MS Office, data entry, record-keeping).
  • Reliable, responsible, and willing to learn; able to work under supervision and follow technical instructions.
  • Able to work in a fast-paced operational environment and meet task timelines with accuracy and professionalism.
  • Good attention to details, a hands-on mindset, and ability to work effectively as part of a team.

postedCompany.description:
The Company is a test laboratory specializing in fast, reliable and accurate testing of metal since 1985. We offer a comprehensive selection of tests and inspection services including mechanical tests, chemical and metallographic analysis, corrosion tests, non-destructive tests, welding consultancy & weld inspection, failure analysis, etc. Our facilities in Singapore, Malaysia and Indonesia are accredited to ISO/IEC 17025:2005 by SAC-SINGLAS, SAMM and KAN respectively.


We have gained recognition from the Oil & Gas, Offshore & Marine, Construction, and Manufacturing industries as a leading provider of quick, reliable, and accurate testing of metals.
postedCompany.name: PROFESSIONAL TESTING SERVICES PTE LTD
